signs.title: Rent a boat and sail the
It takes time to cross the
All maps are found in chests
There is one town for each

dialog.body:
King Maximus bids you welcome,
Hero.

Return with the stolen Scepter
of Order and the Four Continents
shall be yours.

audience.intro:
Trumpets announce your
arrival with regal fanfare.

King Maximus rises from his
throne to greet you and
proclaims:           (space)
audience.rank_up:
Congratulations %NAME%,

I now promote you to
%RANK%.
audience.more_needed:
My dear %NAME%,

I can aid you better after
you've captured %NEEDED% more
villains.
audience.final_rank:
%NAME% the %RANK%,

Hurry and recover my Scepter
of Order or all will be
lost!

lose.body:
%NAME% they
call the %RANK%,
you have doomed us
all.
The land is in
disarray without
it's king. All
hope is lost.
The villains are
unpunished and the
beast roams free.
The peasants are
terrified and your
army has abandoned
your cause.
All because you
wasted your time
so carelessly.
Final Score:
%SCORE%

win.body:
Good job, soldier!
You have tamed the
beast and captured
the villains. The
order is restored
accross the land.

History will reme-
mber the name of
%NAME%, the
%RANK%-who-
saved us all.

You keep all the
castles and your
commission is
trippled.


Final Score:
%SCORE%

banners.chest_gold:
After scouring the area,
you fall upon a hidden
treasure cache. You may:
A) Take the %GOLD% gold.
B) Distribute the gold to
the peasants, increasing
your leadership by %LEADERSHIP%.
banners.chest_commission:
After surveying the area,
you discover that it is
rich in mineral deposits.

The King rewards you for
your find by increasing
your weekly income by %POINTS%
banners.chest_spell_power:
Traversing the area, you
stumble upon a time worn
cannister. Curious, you un-
stop the bottle, releasing
a powerful genie who raises
your Spell Power by %POINTS% and
vanishes.
banners.chest_max_spells:
A tribe of nomads greet you
and your army warmly. Their
shaman, in awe of your
prowess, teaches you the
secret of his tribe's magic.
Your maximum spell capacity
is increased by %POINTS%
banners.chest_new_spell:
You have captured a
mischevious imp which has
been terrorizing the
region. In exchange for
its release, you receive:

   %COUNT% %SPELL% spell.
banners.town_contract_new:
New contract: %VILLAIN%.
Reward: %REWARD% gold.
Last seen on %ZONE%.
banners.town_contract_none: No contracts are available right now.
banners.town_intel_monsters_generic:
Various groups of monsters
  occupy the castle.
banners.town_spell_at_cap: You have learned your maximum number of spells.
banners.spell_bridge_prompt:
Build bridge in which
direction? Use arrows.
banners.spell_bridge_invalid:
Not a suitable location
for a bridge.
banners.spell_castle_gate_none:
You have not visited
any castles yet.
banners.spell_town_gate_none:
You have not visited
any towns yet.
banners.encounter_join_named:
%LABEL% %TROOP%,
with desires of greater
glory, wish to join you.
banners.encounter_join_numeric:
%COUNT% %TROOP%,
with desires of greater
glory, wish to join you.
banners.encounter_wanderers:
They flee in terror at the
sight of your vast army.
banners.alcove_offer:
The venerable Archmage,
Aurange, will teach you the
secrets of spell casting for
%COST% gold.

Accept?
banners.alcove_already:
The archmage nods.
You already know magic.
banners.alcove_taught:
Aurange teaches you the
arcane arts. You now know
the ways of magic.
banners.alcove_no_gold:
You have not enough gold!
%COST% is required.
Begone until you do!
banners.no_spell_banner:
You have not been trained in
the art of spellcasting yet.
Visit the Archmage Aurange
in %ZONE% at %X%,%Y% for
this ability.
banners.new_game_intro:
%NAME% the %CLASS%,
A new game is being created.
Please wait while I perform
godlike actions to make this
game playable.
banners.dwelling_recruit_prompt:
%COUNT% %TROOP% are available
Cost=%COST% each.  GP=%GOLD%
You may recruit up to %CAP%.
banners.dwelling_none_this_week:
No troops are available here
this week.
banners.telecave_teleport:
You step into the cave and
emerge elsewhere on this
continent.
banners.telecave_inert:
This cave hums with magic,
but nothing happens.
banners.crystal_ball_pickup:
You gaze into a crystal ball
and see all of %ZONE%!
banners.astrology_body:
Astrologers proclaim:
Week of the %TROOP%

All %TROOP% dwellings are
repopulated.         (space)
banners.temp_death:
After being disgraced on the
field of battle, King
Maximus summons you to his
castle. After a lesson in
tactics, he reluctantly re-
issues your commission and
sends you on your way.
banners.combat_give_up_body:
Giving up will forfeit your
armies and send you back to
the King. Give up
banners.body_save_confirm:
Your game has been saved.
Press Control-Q to Quit or
any other key to continue.
banners.body_search:
It will take %DAYS% days to
search this area.
Search?
banners.body_dismiss_last:
If you dismiss your last
army, you will be sent back
to the King in disgrace.
Dismiss last army?
banners.body_home_castle:
Castle of King Maximus

A) Recruit Soldiers
B) Audience with the King
banners.body_no_continents:
No known continents from
this zone.
banners.body_must_be_sailing:
You must be sailing to
navigate to another
continent.
banners.cannot_garrison_last:
You cannot garrison your
        last army!
banners.army_cannot_handle:
Your army cannot handle
that many troops.

combat_log.no_effect_msg: The spell seems to have no effect!
combat_log.give_up_prompt:
Giving up will forfeit your
armies and send you back to
the King. Give up (y/n)?

startup.controls_hint: UP/DN move  ENTER pick  ESC quit
startup.class_select_hint: Select Char A-D or L-Load saved game

murray.features:
Threadbare clothes, bald
patch with hair combed to
cover it, incessant cough.
murray.crimes:
Murray is wanted for
various petty crimes as well
as for treason. He allowed a
group of pirates to enter the
castle and free criminals.

hack.features:
Bushy ebon beard stained
with tobacco juice, numerous
battle scars, brash, arrogant
behavior.
hack.crimes:
Along with many minor
infractions, Hack is wanted
for conspiracy against the
Crown and grave-robbing.

aimola.features:
Excessive use of make-up
to hide aging features, ever-
present lace handkerchief.
aimola.crimes:
The Princess violated
her status as a visiting
dignitary by encouraging a
murder and joining the
conspiracy against the Crown.

baron_makahl.features:
Expensive and gaudy
clothes, overweight, and
a scruffy beard.
baron_makahl.crimes:
Johnno is wanted for
various crimes against the
Kingdom, including leading a
direct assault against the
Crown and conspiracy.

dread_rob.features:
Pencil thin moustache
and elegantly trimmed beard,
never without a rapier.
dread_rob.crimes:
Rob is wanted for piracy
as well a conspiracy and for
breaking out five traitors
sentenced to death in the
Royal Dungeons.

caneghor.features:
Voluminous robes, bald
head, magic symbols engraved
on body, levitating ability.
caneghor.crimes:
Canegor is wanted for
grave robbing, conspiracy
against the Crown, and
plundering the Royal Library.

moradon.features:
Always wearing armor and
concealed weapons, has two
prominent front teeth and an
unkept beard.
moradon.crimes:
Sir Moradon, an emissary
from another land, is wanted
for joining a conspiracy to
topple the kingdom.

barrowpine.features:
Pointed ears, sharp
elfin features, pale blue eyes
with no whites, glimmering
enchanted coin.
barrowpine.crimes:
The prince is one of the
leaders of the conspiracy
against the Crown, he also
traffics stolen artifacts.

bargash.features:
Single eye centered in
middle of forehead, over ten
feet tall, only hair on body
is in beard.
bargash.crimes:
Bargash is wanted for
conspiracy against the Crown
and for leading an outright
attack against the King.

rinaldus.features:
Rinaldus is a magically
animated skeleton, an undead,
he is easily identifiable by
the ancient crown he wears.
rinaldus.crimes:
Rinaldus is wanted for
conspiracy against the Crown
and leading a rebellion on the
continent of Saharia.

ragface.features:
Ragface is an undead, he
is covered from head to foot
in moldering green strips of
cloth. A rotting smell follows
him.
ragface.crimes:
Conspiracy against the
Crown and leading an
insurrection in Saharia.

mahk.features:
Bright orange body hair
on a fluorescent green body, a
tendency to shout for no
apparent reason.
mahk.crimes:
Mahk is wanted for the
conspiracy against the Crown,
leading a jail break, and for
piracy on the open seas.

auric.features:
Auric is heavily muscled
and wears a protective skin
made from the hides of baby
lambs.
auric.crimes:
Auric is wanted for
conspiracy and for leading the
rebellion of the continent
Saharia.

czar_nickolai.features:
The Czar has eyes which
change color constantly, also
a sulphuric smell emanates
from his body.
czar_nickolai.crimes:
The Czar is wanted for
conspiracy against the Crown,
violating diplomatic status,
and murder.

magus.features:
Pupil-less eyes, flowing
white beard, always wears
crimson robes and a matching
skull cap.
magus.crimes:
Magus is wanted for
conspiracy against the Crown
and for practicing forbidden
magics.

urthrax.features:
Green, scaly skin,
glowing red eyes, horns
protruding from sides of head,
over 7 feet tall.
urthrax.crimes:
Urthrax is wanted for
conspiracy against the Crown.

arech.features:
Arech is an immense
dragon with a green body and
blue wings, he breathes fire.
arech.crimes:
Arech is wanted for
leading the conspiracy against
the Crown, arranging jail-
breaks, fomenting rebellion,
stealing the Sceptre of Order.
